beef.label: Beef (Lean Steak)
props: Primary source of highly bioavailable heme-iron
Contains Creatine and Carnosine
Grass-fed varieties have better Omega-3 ratios

lamb.label: Lamb / Mutton
props: Rich in CLA (potentially metabolic supporting fats)
Distinctive flavor from branched-chain fatty acids
Higher iron content than many other meats

wagyu_kobe_beef.label: Wagyu / Kobe Beef (A5)
props: Highest marbling of any beef in the world
Fat has a lower melting point than human body temperature
Rich in monounsaturated fats (MUFAs) compared to regular beef

lean_ground_beef.label: Ground Beef (Lean <5% Fat)
props: Leanest version of minced meat
High protein density
Standard for fitness-focused 'Meal Prep'

standard_ground_beef.label: Ground Beef (Standard ~20% Fat)
props: Ideal fat-to-protein ratio for flavor and juiciness
Fat provides the necessary 'mouthfeel' and aroma transport
Significantly more calories than lean version

rib_eye_steak.label: Rib-Eye / Entrecôte
props: Contains the 'Spinalis Dorsi' (the most flavorful muscle)
High intramuscular fat
Classic steak-house cut

beef_fillet.label: Beef Fillet / Tenderloin
props: The leanest and most tender steak cut
Derived from the Psoas major muscle
Low in connective tissue

chicken_breast.label: Chicken Breast
props: Lowest fat-to-protein ratio in the meat category
Mild flavor, highly versatile
Main source of lean protein globally

turkey_breast.label: Turkey Breast
props: Even leaner than chicken breast
High tryptophan content may support sleep/mood
Very sensitive to overcooking (dries out)

duck_breast.label: Duck Breast
props: Red muscle fibers (unlike chicken breast)
Very high fat content in the skin
Distinctive, gamey flavor profile

goose.label: Goose
props: Traditional Christmas roast
Extremely high fat content, used to make goose fat (Schmalz)
Meaty and flavorful

chicken_thigh.label: Chicken Thigh (with Skin)
props: Contains more iron and zinc than white meat
Skin provides significant monounsaturated fats
Stays tender even when overcooked

turkey_drumstick.label: Turkey Drumstick
props: Leaner than chicken thighs but richer than turkey breast
High in connective tissue, ideal for slow roasting
Rich in selenium and B-vitamins

pulled_turkey.label: Pulled Turkey
props: Leaner alternative to pulled pork
Typically made from thigh meat to prevent dryness
High satiety due to high protein content

chicken_liver.label: Chicken Liver
props: Milder taste than beef liver
Highest source of dietary folate (B9)
Must be cooked carefully to remain creamy

chicken_heart.label: Chicken Heart
props: Pure muscle tissue with zero waste
Firm, slightly bouncy texture
Often used in Brazilian BBQ (Coração de Frango)

chicken_gizzard.label: Chicken Gizzard
props: Extremely tough muscle used for grinding grain
Requires long braising time
Almost 100% lean protein

pork.label: Pork (Lean Loin)
props: Highest Thiamin (B1) source among all meats
Versatile textures from lean loin to fatty belly
Cultural staple in Central Europe and Asia

pork_spareribs.label: Pork Spareribs
props: High bone-to-meat ratio
Very high fat content
Requires long cooking to break down collagen

pulled_pork.label: Pulled Pork (Shoulder)
props: Made from pork shoulder (Boston Butt)
Collagen turns into gelatin during 10-15h cook time
Often contains added sugars from BBQ rubs/sauces

venison.label: Venison (Deer)
props: Higher iron and less fat than beef
Completely free of antibiotics and industrial feed
Intense, gamy flavor profile

beef_liver.label: Beef Liver

quality_metrics.safety: Limit consumption (Vitamin A / Copper toxicity if daily)

props: Nature's Multivitamin
Densely packed with Retinol (Pre-formed Vit A)
Unrivaled B12 and Copper source

beef_heart.label: Beef Heart
props: A working muscle, tastes like very lean beef
Extremely rich in CoQ10 for cardiac health
Very affordable high-nutrient meat

pork_kidney.label: Pork Kidney
props: Incredibly high in selenium
Requires careful cleaning to remove urea scent
Traditional in British and French cuisine

beef_tongue.label: Beef Tongue
props: High-fat muscle meat
Incredibly tender texture once the outer skin is removed
Traditional delicacy in many cultures

bone_marrow.label: Bone Marrow

quality_metrics.lipid_profile: Pure Healthy Fats / Stem Cell focus

props: 'Butter of the gods'
Contains adiponectin (hormone for insulin sensitivity)
Basis for gourmet stocks and sauces

wild_salmon.label: Wild Salmon
props: Rich in astaxanthin (powerful antioxidant)
Highest natural Vitamin D source
Wild-caught has superior fatty acid profile to farmed

mackerel.label: Mackerel
props: Extremely high fat content, mostly healthy unsaturated fats
Strong, distinctive flavor
Excellent source of B12 and Selenium

herring.label: Herring
props: North Sea staple
Often eaten pickled (Matjes)
High in Vitamin D and iodine

sardines.label: Sardines
props: Small fish = very low heavy metal accumulation
Calcium powerhouse when eaten with soft bones
Sustainable seafood choice

caviar.label: Sturgeon Caviar
props: Salt-cured sturgeon eggs
Extremely dense in Omega-3 and B12
Traditional luxury item with high sodium content

gilt_head_bream.label: Gilt-head Bream (Dorade)
props: Popular Mediterranean white fish
Firm flesh, ideal for grilling whole
Good source of lean protein

cod.label: Cod / Skrei
props: Extremely low fat, perfect for calorie-controlled diets
Flaky, mild white flesh
Liver is the source of Cod Liver Oil

tuna.label: Tuna (Yellowfin/Lean)
props: High-protein staple for athletes
Meaty texture, often eaten as steaks
Rich in selenium to counteract mercury toxicity

sea_bass.label: European Sea Bass (Wolfsbarsch)
props: The 'Loup de Mer' of French cuisine
Fine-textured, mild-flavored white fish
Very low in scales, making it ideal for grilling whole

turbot.label: Turbot (Steinbutt)
props: Prized for its firm, white flesh and rich gelatinous texture near the fins
High collagen content among fish
The most expensive and noble flatfish

common_sole.label: Common Sole (Seeunge)
props: Unparalleled delicate and sweet flavor
Maintains its shape perfectly when pan-fried (Sole Meunière)
Extremely lean protein source

rainbow_trout.label: Rainbow Trout
props: Mild, nutty flavor
Good source of Omega-3 for a non-sea fish
Very popular in European inland cuisine

shrimp_prawns.label: Shrimp / Prawns

quality_metrics.lipid_profile: High Cholesterol but Low Saturated Fat

props: Extremely high protein density
Contains astaxanthin
Quick-cooking and versatile

mussels.label: Mussels
props: Unbelievably high B12 and iron content
Filter feeders (highly sustainable)
Rich in manganese and selenium

octopus.label: Octopus
props: Excellent source of B12 and iron
Low calorie, high satiety
Unique rubbery-tender texture when cooked correctly

squid_calamari.label: Squid / Calamari
props: High in copper for red blood cell formation
Extremely versatile (fried, grilled, or stewed)
Tubes and tentacles are both edible

king_scallop.label: King Scallop
props: Prized for their delicate, sweet flavor
Rich in magnesium and potassium
The 'adductor muscle' is the part primarily consumed

oyster.label: Oyster
props: Highest natural source of Zinc (essential for testosterone and immunity)
Often eaten alive/raw with lemon
Filter-feeders that concentrate ocean minerals

smoked_eel.label: Smoked Eel
props: Incredibly rich in Vitamin A and D
High fat content provides an intense smoky flavor
Considered a delicacy but status is endangered

lobster.label: Lobster
props: High in selenium for thyroid support
Meat is incredibly lean despite its 'rich' reputation (often served with butter)
Rich in copper and B12

smoked_salmon.label: Räucherlachs (Kaltgeräuchert)
props: Raw salmon cured with salt and cold-smoked to preserve a silky texture
Rich in EPA and DHA Omega-3 fatty acids
Classic breakfast luxury on bagels or black bread

graved_salmon.label: Graved Lachs (Gravlax)
props: Nordic dish of salmon cured in salt, sugar, and fresh dill
Is never smoked, resulting in a cleaner, less woody taste than smoked salmon
Traditionally served with a sweet mustard-dill sauce (Hovmästarsås)

sausage_gutfried_poultry_thick.label: Gutfried Geflügel-Fleischwurst (Die Dicke)
props: The market leader for thick poultry sausages in Germany
Significantly lower fat than pork Fleischwurst (~15% vs ~25%)
Classic Brotzeit staple, extremely smooth texture

sausage_dulano_poultry_thick.label: Dulano Geflügel-Fleischwurst (Lidl)
props: Lidl's high-volume private label answer to Gutfried
Very similar nutritional profile, slightly higher fat content
Often sold in twin-packs

lang.ja: デュラノ 家禽ソーセージ

cold_cut_dulano_chicken_breast.label: Dulano Hähnchenbrust-Aufschnitt (Scheiben)
props: Standard fitness and diet cold cut
Extremely high protein-to-calorie ratio
Often reformed from breast meat pieces with added water/binders

cold_cut_dulano_cooked_ham.label: Dulano Delikatess Kochschinken
props: Classic German cooked ham slices
Low fat due to trimmed rind/fat cap
Contains nitrites for pink color preservation

cold_cut_black_forest_ham.label: Schwarzwälder Schinken (Rohschinken)
props: Dry-cured and smoked raw ham
Intense smoky flavor and high salt content
Leaves a distinctive white fat cap

cold_cut_dulano_salami.label: Dulano Salami in Scheiben
props: High calorie, high fat fermented sausage
Low moisture content ensures long shelf life
Lidl's standard breakfast and sandwich salami

cold_cut_dulano_lyoner.label: Dulano Lyoner / Mortadella (Scheiben)
props: Classic German finely emulsified pork sausage
Often features added pistachios or bell peppers (Paprikalyoner)
Soft texture, high fat content

cold_cut_mortadella_bologna_igp.label: Mortadella Bologna IGP (Original Italienisch)
props: Authentic Italian cold cut with visible cubes of throat fat (lardons)
Protected Geographical Indication (IGP) ensures high quality standards
Silky texture achieved by extensive emulsification (traditionally in a mortaio)

lang.ja: モルタデッラ (ボローニャ)

cold_cut_german_mortadella.label: Deutsche Mortadella (Schinkenwurst mit Pistazien)

quality_metrics.comparison: No large fat cubes unlike Italian original

props: German adaptation of the Italian classic
Usually a base of fine Schinkenwurst or Lyoner mixed with pistachios
Standard staple in German discount bakeries and supermarkets

lang.ja: ドイツ風モルタデッラ

sausage_beef_salami.label: Rindersalami (Halal)
props: Standard in oriental supermarkets and halal sections
Stronger, darker, and slightly more robust flavor than pork salami
Often smoked over beechwood

sausage_poultry_salami.label: Geflügelsalami
props: Made primarily from turkey or chicken (sometimes mixed with plant oils for texture)
Significantly lower in calories and fat than classic pork salami
Softer texture due to lower saturated fat content

sausage_sucuk.label: Sucuk (Knoblauchwurst)
props: Traditional dry, spicy and fermented sausage from the Balkans and Middle East
Heavily spiced with cumin, sumac, and garlic
Releases its own flavorful red oil when pan-fried

cold_cut_bierschinken.label: Bierschinken
props: Fine sausage emulsion (Brät) embedded with large, lean chunks of cured pork or beef
Does not actually contain beer (named because it was traditionally eaten with beer)
High protein and lower fat compared to Salami or Mortadella

cold_cut_leberkaese.label: Leberkäse / Fleischkäse
props: A Southern German specialty (Bavarian Leberkäse contains NO liver or cheese)
Finely ground corned beef, pork, and bacon baked until a brown crust forms
Often eaten hot in a bread roll (Leberkäsesemmel)

sausage_bratwurst_pork.label: Grobe Bratwurst (Schwein)
props: The absolute standard German BBQ sausage
High fat content ensures juiciness over open charcoal
Seasoned primarily with pepper, salt, mace, and nutmeg

sausage_nuernberger.label: Nürnberger Rostbratwurst
props: Strictly protected geographical indication (must be produced in Nuremberg)
Small size (7-9 cm) and intense marjoram flavor
Traditionally served in threes in a bun (Drei im Weggla)

lang.ja: ニュルンベルガーソーセージ

sausage_kaesekrainer.label: Käsekrainer
props: Austrian invention that conquered German BBQ
Contains small cubes of hard cheese that melt during grilling
Must be grilled carefully to prevent the cheese from burning/leaking completely

lang.ja: チーズ入りソーセージ

sausage_krakauer.label: Krakauer / Rote Wurst

quality_metrics.texture: Coarse meat chunks in fine emulsion

props: Cured with nitrite salt giving it the signature red color
Spicier and smokier than a standard Bratwurst
Usually contains garlic and coriander

lang.ja: クラカウアーソーセージ

sausage_poultry_bratwurst.label: Geflügel-Bratwurst
props: Lighter alternative to pork, fast cooking time
Often a very fine emulsion (Brät) compared to coarse pork sausages
Dries out faster on the grill due to lower fat content

lang.ja: 家禽ブラートヴルスト

sausage_merguez.label: Merguez
props: Maghrebi origin, heavily spiced with harissa, cumin, and fennel
Strictly made from beef and/or lamb (Halal compatible)
Thin casing, cooks extremely fast, releases red chili oil

sausage_meica_bratmaxe.label: Meica Bratmaxe
props: Eine der bekanntesten Marken-Bratwürste Deutschlands
Feines Brät, extrem knackiger Biss durch speziellen Saitling
Vorgebrüht für sehr schnelles Grillen

lang.ja: マイカ ブラートマクセ

sausage_wiesenhof_bruzzzler.label: Wiesenhof Bruzzzler (Geflügel)
props: Die dominierende Marken-Geflügelbratwurst in Deutschland
Fettreduziert im Vergleich zur Schweinebratwurst
Sehr feine Textur, stark gewürzt, um das magere Fleisch auszugleichen

lang.ja: ヴィーゼンホフ ブルッツラー

sausage_egetuerk_soelen.label: Egetürk Şölen (Grill-Sucuk)
props: Deutschlands bekannteste Sucuk-Marke
Die 'Şölen'-Variante ist speziell für den Grill gemacht (läuft weniger aus)
Intensives Knoblauch- und Kreuzkümmel-Aroma

lang.ja: エゲテュルク グリルスジュク

bbq_cevapcici_beef.label: Cevapcici (Rind / Lamm)
props: Klassische Hackfleischröllchen aus dem Balkan, stark vertreten im Orient-Markt
Komplett ohne Darm
Oft mit etwas Natron (Baking Soda) versetzt für eine luftigere, federnde Textur beim Grillen

bbq_adana_kebab_skewer.label: Adana Kebab (Grillspieß)

quality_metrics.fat_source: Often contains lamb tail fat (Kuyruk yağı)

props: Breiter, flacher Hackfleischspieß (oft Rind/Lamm-Mix)
Erhält seine Saftigkeit durch gehacktes Lamm-Schwanzfett
Scharf gewürzt mit Pul Biber (Chiliflocken) und Paprika

bbq_grillfackeln.label: Grillfackeln (Schweinebauch am Spieß)
props: Hauchdünne Schweinebauchscheiben, die eng um einen Holzspieß gewickelt werden
Extremer Fettbrand auf dem Grill durch herabtropfendes Fett (Thermodynamik-Hölle)
Der absolute Inbegriff des deutschen Discounter-BBQs

lang.ja: 豚バラ串 (グリルファッケルン)

bbq_pork_belly_slices.label: Schweinebauchscheiben (Kräuter/Paprika)
props: Dicke, marinierte Scheiben aus dem Schweinebauch
Oft mit Knorpelstückchen durchsetzt, die beim Grillen knusprig werden
Höchste Kaloriendichte im gesamten Fleischregal

bbq_spareribs_marinated.label: Spareribs / Schälrippchen (Mariniert & Vorgegart)
props: Meist industriell vorgegart (sous-vide) und in dicker BBQ-Marinade eingeschweißt
Garantieren 'Fall-off-the-bone'-Zartheit ohne stundenlanges Smoken
Enthalten durch die süße Barbecue-Glasur deutlich mehr Zucker als pure Steaks

sausage_berner_wuerstel.label: Berner Würstel (Käsefüllung & Speckmantel)
props: Der absolute Endgegner: Ein Käsewürstchen, das komplett in geräucherten Bacon eingewickelt ist
Erfunden in Österreich (Zell am See), heute ein Lidl-Standard
Bacon wird beim Grillen knusprig, während der Käse im Inneren schmilzt

lang.ja: ベルナー・ヴュルステル (ベーコン巻きチーズ入り)

sausage_bratwurst_schnecke.label: Bratwurstschnecke
props: Eine extrem lange, dünne Bratwurst, die zu einer Spirale gewickelt und mit einem Holzspieß fixiert wird
Optischer Hingucker, backt durch die große Oberfläche sehr knusprig
Gleiches Brät wie eine Standard-Bratwurst, reines Format-Gimmick

sausage_schinkenkrakauer.label: Schinkenkrakauer (Grillwurst)
props: Eine Variante der roten Krakauer, die mit großen mageren Schinkenstücken durchsetzt ist
Fest im Biss, extrem saftig
Die Standard-Alternative für alle, denen eine normale Bratwurst zu langweilig ist

bbq_chicken_wings_marinated.label: Hähnchenflügel / Chicken Wings (Mariniert)
props: High skin-to-meat ratio makes them incredibly crispy on the open grill
Often sold in split 'flats' and 'drumettes'
The absolute standard finger food for BBQs

bbq_chicken_drumsticks.label: Hähnchenunterschenkel / Drumsticks (Mariniert)
props: Bone-in dark meat, stays extremely juicy on the grill without drying out
Takes significantly longer to cook through than breast meat
Lidl and Aldi often sell them in massive 1kg+ BBQ family packs

lang.ja: 味付け鶏ドラムスティック

bbq_chicken_skewers_paprika.label: Hähnchenspieße (Paprika-Marinade)
props: Lean breast meat threaded onto wooden skewers
Prone to drying out quickly on a hot grill if unattended
Sweet and smoky paprika marinade adds a caramelized crust

bbq_chicken_inner_fillet.label: Hähnchen-Innenfilets / Tenders (Natur/Mariniert)
props: The 'Pectus minor' muscle, loosely attached to the underside of the breast
The absolute most tender part of the chicken
Cooks in under 5 minutes on a hot grill
